file_insights.changes: Complete rewrite from stub to fully functional dashboard component
key_additions: State management for dashboard data fetching via useEffect
StatCard component for displaying content status counts with color-coded badges
MiniCalendar component with month navigation and date highlighting
UpcomingContentItem component for rendering scheduled content in list
Error handling with fallback empty state when API fails
imports_added: Additional Lucide icons (Plus, ChevronLeft, ChevronRight, Video, Globe)

patterns_discovered.name: Component Composition with Configuration Objects
patterns_discovered.description: STATUS_CONFIG and CONTENT_TYPE_ICONS records map enums to UI properties (labels, icons, colors), enabling data-driven rendering
patterns_discovered.benefit: Eliminates hardcoded values, makes status/type changes maintainable

patterns_discovered.name: API Error Handling with Graceful Degradation
patterns_discovered.description: Try-catch wraps API call, errors show warning banner and render empty state with zero counts
patterns_discovered.benefit: App remains functional even when backend is unavailable

patterns_discovered.name: Calendar Logic with Memoization
patterns_discovered.description: useMemo calculates calendar grid cells (padding nulls + days), date math for first day of week

patterns_discovered.name: Responsive Grid Layout
patterns_discovered.description: Stats use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 (1 col mobile, 4 col desktop), main section uses lg:grid-cols-2
patterns_discovered.benefit: Adapts to different screen sizes automatically

patterns_discovered.name: Extracted Helper Components
patterns_discovered.description: StatCard, MiniCalendar, UpcomingContentItem split complex UI into reusable pieces

gotchas_discovered.detail: Required careful handling of: days in month, first day of week, null padding for empty cells, date comparison for highlighting today
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Used useMemo to isolate logic, isToday function for comparison

gotchas_discovered.detail: API_BASE constant hardcoded to 'http://localhost:8000', may break in production
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Should be moved to environment config

gotchas_discovered.detail: Fallback summary object created on error, but could mask real data loading issues
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Error message displayed, but user sees empty dashboard

gotchas_discovered.detail: Uses byStatus[status] ?? 0 to handle potential undefined values
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Proper null coalescing prevents type errors

gotchas_discovered.detail: If list grows beyond viewport, no scroll or pagination mechanism
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Currently acceptable for 7-day window, may need pagination later

approach_details.strategy: Built modular dashboard from top-down: main DashboardPage manages state and fetches data, smaller components (StatCard, MiniCalendar, UpcomingContentItem) handle rendering
approach_details.execution: Completed all requirements: (1) status summary with 4 color-coded stat cards, (2) upcoming content list for next 7 days, (3) mini calendar with navigation, (4) quick-create button in header
approach_details.quality_measures: Included loading state, error handling with user feedback, proper TypeScript typing, responsive design

recommendations.item: Move API_BASE to environment configuration (.env or config file) instead of hardcoded string
Add caching mechanism for dashboard summary to reduce API calls on rapid re-renders
Add refresh button in header to manually reload dashboard data
Make calendar interactive: clicking a date should filter upcoming content or jump to specific date
Add pagination or infinite scroll to upcoming content list if data grows beyond 7-day window
Add aria-labels to calendar navigation buttons and status cards for screen reader support
Consider adding retry logic or exponential backoff for API failures instead of immediate fallback
